I,s in ipairs({{304700+-304699;790919+-785427},{627602+-627601;-983336-(-987141)},{-559880-(-563686);661718-656226}})do while s[567905-567904]<s[239310+-239308]do F({},{[I(594271+-597138)]=U,[I(272829-280578)]=H,[I(214006+-218979)]=function()return 111168+2932611 end})end end,function(H,I)local X=T(I)local t=function(t,F)return s(H,{t;F},I,X)end return t end,function(H,I)local X=T(I)local t=function(t,F,j,m)return s(H,{t;F,j,m},I,X)end return t end,{},{},function(H,I)local X=T(I)local t=function(...)return s(H,{...},I,X)end return t end,function(H,I)local X=T(I)local t=function(t,F,j)return s(H,{t;F,j},I,X)end return t end,function(H,I)local X=T(I)local t=function(t)return s(H,{t},I,X)end return t end return(a(1107175-(-763682),{}))(X(B))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[I(-629663+625752)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
